get.summary: Fetch all Transactions for the authenticated User.

parameters.description: Only return Transactions belonging to this Account.

schema.description: Only return Transactions belonging to this Account.

parameters.name: account_id

parameters.description: Only return Transactions with matching payee.

schema.description: Only return Transactions with matching payee.

parameters.name: payee

parameters.description: Only return Transactions greater than or equal to amount.

parameters.description: Only return Transactions less than or equal to amount.

schema.title: Maximum Amount
schema.description: Only return Transactions less than or equal to amount.

parameters.name: maximum_amount

parameters.description: Only return Transactions after the given date & time.

schema.title: After

parameters.name: after

parameters.description: Only return Transactions before the given date & time.

schema.title: Before
schema.description: Only return Transactions before the given date & time.

parameters.name: before

parameters.description: Only return specified number of Transactions.

schema.title: Limit
schema.description: Only return specified number of Transactions.

parameters.name: limit

get.summary: Get sum total Balance of all accounts for the current User.

Get requested Category for current user.

put.description:
Add funds to (or remove funds from, if given as a negative) category.

Optionally, include source/target category for funds to be taken
from/sent to. Defaults to Available Balance if not given.

parameters.description: Where take funds from; default: Available Balance.

schema.description: Where take funds from; default: Available Balance.
